message:
e2e: Fix test authentication and CLI upload connectivity

- Move dashboard and upload tests to tests/authenticated/ directory
  so they run with the authenticated storage state
- Fix CLI upload tests using wrong server URL by setting HOME to a
  temp directory, preventing the CLI from reading user's existing
  config and forcing it to use SERVER_URL env var
- Update dashboard assertions to match current UI (Test User instead
  of email, transcript cards instead of table rows)
- Make dashboard tests serial to avoid SQLite concurrency conflicts
- Extract transcript ID from CLI output for more reliable UI assertions
- Add --host flag to test server for broader network binding

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/faa8e80c-0f1a-4982-973b-545f716bb46a
